title: GCOM User Machine Profile
description: User-authored machine profile storing plain concrete GCOM examples for AI context injection.

name.description: Human-readable machine name, e.g. 'Ortur LM2 Pro S2'

notes.description: Free-form notes about this machine injected into AI context

unit_mode.description: Unit system this machine uses. Metric = G21, Imperial = G20.

safe_z_mm.description: Safe retract height above material in mm for all rapids and tool-off moves

work_offset.description: Active work coordinate system, e.g. G54

axes.description: Axes this machine has, e.g. ["X","Y"] for a laser or ["X","Y","Z"] for a router. When Z is absent the AI must not emit Z words in generated GCOM.

base_controller.description: Controller profile this machine is based on

commands.description: Plain concrete GCOM command examples for AI context. Names are free-form; lifecycle hook names (job_start, job_end, tool_on_sequence, tool_off_sequence, home, rapid_move, cut_move) are suggested in the profiler UI.

name.description: Command identifier. No enum constraint — lifecycle hook names are conventions only.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this command does

gcom.description: Complete literal runnable GCOM line, or an array of GCOM lines forming a multi-line sequence

example.description: Optional example usage or context note

snippets.description: Named reusable GCOM blocks for AI context

presets.description: Default numeric presets for this machine

default_power.description: Default spindle/laser power (0-255 or 0-1000 depending on machine)

rapid_feed.description: Rapid positioning feed rate in mm/min

plunge_feed.description: Feed rate for Z-axis plunge moves in mm/min

output_profile.description: Optional structured S-value semantics for this machine. Defines what the controller's S range means and which laser mode the AI should prefer when generating tool-on commands.

meaning.description: What S values represent on this machine. Use laser_power for GRBL laser workflows and spindle_rpm for spindle speed workflows.

s_value_min.description: Minimum valid S value for this machine, equivalent to GRBL $31 when applicable.

s_value_max.description: Maximum valid S value for this machine, equivalent to GRBL $30 when applicable.

preferred_laser_mode.description: Preferred GRBL laser power mode. M3 keeps constant power, M4 dynamically scales power with motion speed, unspecified leaves the choice to the generated program.

peripherals.description: Optional peripheral devices attached to this machine

air_assist_on.description: GCOM line to turn air assist on

air_assist_off.description: GCOM line to turn air assist off

coolant_on.description: GCOM line to turn coolant on

coolant_off.description: GCOM line to turn coolant off

vacuum_on.description: GCOM line to turn vacuum on

vacuum_off.description: GCOM line to turn vacuum off

transport_tuning.description: Optional sender fallback capacities used before live Bf observations are available

rx_buffer_bytes.description: Fallback serial RX buffer capacity in bytes when Bf serial data is not yet observed

planner_slots.description: Fallback planner capacity in slots when Bf planner data is unavailable
